metadata.name: smooth spectrum analyser - mono 16 channels
metadata.author: martin
metadata.source: martin - smooth spectrum analyser - mono 16 channels.milk

perFrameCode: dt = 1/fps; dec_s = 1-dt;
voleff = 0.0;
n = 0; loop (16,
if (gmegabuf(n) > gmegabuf(40+n), gmegabuf(80+n)=2; gmegabuf (40+n) = gmegabuf(n), gmegabuf(80+n)-= dt);
if (gmegabuf(80+n) <= 0, gmegabuf (40+n) = max (0,gmegabuf(40+n)-0.1*dt);, 0);
voleff += pow (gmegabuf(n),2);
voleff_ = voleff_*dec_s + (1-dec_s)*sqrt (voleff);
q1 = gmegabuf (0) + int (500*gmegabuf (40));  q2 = gmegabuf (1) + int (500*gmegabuf (41));
q3 = gmegabuf (2) + int (500*gmegabuf (42));  q4 = gmegabuf (3) + int (500*gmegabuf (43));
q5 = gmegabuf (4) + int (500*gmegabuf (44));  q6 = gmegabuf (5) + int (500*gmegabuf (45));
q7 = gmegabuf (6) + int (500*gmegabuf (46));  q8 = gmegabuf (7) + int (500*gmegabuf (47));
q9 = gmegabuf (8) + int (500*gmegabuf (48));  q10 = gmegabuf (9) + int (500*gmegabuf (49));
q11 = gmegabuf (10)+ int (500*gmegabuf (50)); q12 = gmegabuf (11)+ int (500*gmegabuf (51));
q13 = gmegabuf (12)+ int (500*gmegabuf (52)); q14 = gmegabuf (13)+ int (500*gmegabuf (53));
q15 = gmegabuf (14)+ int (500*gmegabuf (54)); q16 = gmegabuf (15)+ int (500*gmegabuf (55));
q20 = voleff_;
trel1 += q20/9*dt; trel2 += (0.5+gmegabuf(4))*dt/2; trel3 += dt*0.2; trel4 += (0.7+gmegabuf(6))*dt*0.1;
q21 = sin(trel1)*0.25; q22 = sin (trel2)*0.2; q23 = sin(trel3)*0.1; q24 = sin(trel4)*6;
q25 = led;
perFrameInitCode: trel1 = rand(6); trel2 = rand(6); trel3 = rand(6);
